title: ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Complete Gold Panning Kit | Sifters Classifiers Accessories
description:
Strike it rich with the ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Prospecting Kit! This set comes with everything you'll need to sift, locate and contain gold and minerals while out gold panning. In the kit we've included 1 of our most popular sizes of sifting classifiers: 1/2". These sifting classifiers are designed to fit on a 5 gallon bucket. Additionally we've added in 2 different sized sifting pans featuring riffles: 10" and 14" diameters respectively. A few of the other items included are a snifter bottle, a tweezer with a magnifier and 2 glass vials for containing your gems once they've been sifted. This is a great kit for beginners and intermediate gold prospectors! Please note: colors and contents may vary.

ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Complete Gold Panning Kit | Sifters Classifiers Accessories

Strike it rich with the ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Prospecting Kit! This set comes with everything you'll need to sift, locate and contain gold and minerals while out gold panning.

Key Features

  • Size of Classifier Screen: 1/2"
  • Sizes of Gold Pans: 10" & 14" Diameter
  • Size of Gold Vials: 1 1/3 Dram
  • Tweezer w/ 4x Magnifier
  • Capacity of Snifter: 4 fl oz

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 1651300
  • UPC: 0786156001329
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 7pc Combo

In the kit we've included 1 of our most popular sizes of sifting classifiers: 1/2". These sifting classifiers are designed to fit on a 5 gallon bucket. Additionally we've added in 2 different sized sifting pans featuring riffles: 10" and 14" diameters respectively.

A few of the other items included are a snifter bottle, a tweezer with a magnifier and 2 glass vials for containing your gems once they've been sifted. This is a great kit for beginners and intermediate gold prospectors!

Please note: colors and contents may vary.
